data.title: Rank Prompt: Track & Boost Your AI Search Visibility
data.excerpt: Discover how Rank Prompt monitors your brand across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & more—then optimizes content to get recommended. Try it free today.

$media.alt: Rank Prompt: Track & Boost Your AI Search Visibility

children.text: Every week, over 800 million people search using AI tools—ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and others. That number keeps climbing. If your brand isn't showing up when these AI engines answer questions in your niche, you're invisible to a massive and growing audience.
Enter Rank Prompt.

I've been testing Rank Prompt for the past several weeks, and I genuinely believe it fills a gap that almost every content creator, SEO professional, and brand owner has felt but couldn't articulate: *How do I know if AI recommends me—and how do I make it recommend me more?*
Below, I'll walk you through exactly what Rank Prompt does, why it matters, who should use it, and what makes it stand out. If you're serious about the future of search visibility, keep reading.
*I may earn a small commission if you sign up through my links—this helps support TonyCiencia at no extra cost to you.*
What Is Rank Prompt?

Rank Prompt is an AI-powered SEO platform built specifically for the era of AI search. While traditional SEO tools focus on Google rankings and keyword positions, Rank Prompt takes a different angle: it tracks how your brand appears across six major AI platforms—ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Mode, Gemini, Claude, and Grok—and then helps you optimize your content and citations so those platforms recommend you more often.

Think of it as the missing piece between your content strategy and AI discoverability. You publish a great article, Rank Prompt shows you whether ChatGPT or Perplexity actually mentions your brand when someone asks a related question, and then it helps you close the gap.
The platform lives at
rankprompt.com

and runs on a credit-based system. Credits can be spent on AI visibility prompts, article generation, or SEO audits. Every plan includes a 7-day free trial, which is generous enough to actually test the tool properly before committing.

What struck me immediately: Rank Prompt isn't trying to replace your existing SEO stack. It layers on top of it. You can integrate it with WordPress, Shopify, GA4, and Google Search Console. It works *with* your workflow instead of demanding you rebuild everything.
How Rank Prompt Works: The Core Features
Rank Prompt organizes its capabilities around three pillars: monitoring, generating, and building.
Monitor AI Visibility

This is the headline feature, and it's where Rank Prompt shines. You enter your brand name, your website, and the topics you care about. Then Rank Prompt runs prompts across all six AI platforms and reports back: Does ChatGPT mention you? Does Perplexity cite your site? Does Gemini recommend a competitor instead?

The reporting dashboard breaks this down by platform, by prompt, and over time. You can track trends—did your visibility spike after a new blog post? Did it dip after a competitor published something aggressive?—and you can compare yourself against specific competitors.

I ran my first report in under two minutes. The interface is clean: you pick a brand, add some prompt topics, and let it scan. The results came back with a clear visibility score and actionable gaps. No fluff.
Generate Optimized Content

Rank Prompt doesn't just tell you what's wrong—it helps you fix it. The AI article generation tool creates content designed to rank both in traditional search engines and in AI-generated answers. This means the content is structured with clear headings, factual claims, and the kind of authoritative framing that AI models tend to cite.

You get 15 articles per month on the Starter plan, which is plenty for a focused content calendar. Each article comes optimized for your target keywords and aligned with the gaps the visibility tool identified.
Build Citations With Outreach

This surprised me. Rank Prompt includes outreach tools to help you build citations—the external references that AI models use when deciding what to recommend. You can identify citation opportunities and manage outreach campaigns directly from the platform.
Citations are quietly becoming the backlinks of the AI era. If authoritative sites mention your brand, AI engines pick up on that signal. Rank Prompt gets this, and the outreach workflow reflects it.
I found this
step-by-step tutorial on using Rank Prompt
incredibly helpful when I first set things up—highly recommend giving it a read.
Why AI Visibility Matters More Than Ever

Here's the reality: search behavior is fragmenting. Five years ago, "search" meant Google. Today, a meaningful percentage of informational queries happen inside AI chat interfaces. People ask ChatGPT for product recommendations. They ask Perplexity for research summaries. They ask Claude for writing advice.

When an AI tool recommends a brand, the user often doesn't scroll further. There's no second page. There's no "I'll check the next result." The recommendation *is* the result. If you're in it, you win. If you're not, you don't exist for that query.
Rank Prompt gives you visibility into this new landscape. It shows you exactly where you stand and what to do about it. That's not a nice-to-have anymore—it's foundational.

I've seen this play out firsthand. After using Rank Prompt to identify gaps where my brand wasn't being mentioned, I adjusted two pieces of content, and within a few weeks, my visibility score on Perplexity climbed noticeably. Small changes, real results.
If you want to see the full picture, check out
why you should choose Rank Prompt
for a deeper breakdown of its advantages over generic SEO tools.
New & Standout Features Worth Noting
Rank Prompt isn't static—it ships updates regularly. Here are the features that stood out during my testing:
Agent Mode

This is a conversational AI assistant built into the platform. Instead of manually running reports and analyzing data, you can ask Agent Mode questions in plain English: "Why did my visibility drop on Gemini last month?" or "Which competitor is gaining ground on Perplexity for 'project management tools'?" It pulls from your data and gives you direct answers. It feels like having an AI SEO analyst on call.
Lighthouse SEO Audits

Rank Prompt includes site health audits powered by Google's Lighthouse framework. You get performance scores, accessibility checks, and SEO recommendations—all without leaving the platform. On the Starter plan, you get 30 audits per month. That's enough to audit your full site and recheck pages after making changes.
Multi-Platform Trend Tracking

The Trends view shows your visibility trajectory across all six AI platforms on a single timeline. This is brilliant for spotting patterns. Maybe your visibility on ChatGPT is steady while Claude keeps dropping you—that kind of insight tells you exactly where to focus your optimization efforts.
WordPress & Shopify Integrations
You can publish Rank Prompt's AI-generated content directly to your WordPress or Shopify site. No copy-pasting, no reformatting. Write, optimize, publish—all from one dashboard.
Unlimited Brands
Even on the Starter plan, you can track unlimited brands. If you run multiple sites or manage clients, this is a massive value add. Most competing tools charge per brand—Rank Prompt doesn't.
For a look at what's new and upcoming, this
Rank Prompt new features guide
stays updated with the latest releases.
Who Is Rank Prompt Ideal For?
Rank Prompt isn't just for enterprise SEO teams with big budgets. Its pricing and design make it accessible to a wide range of users:
Solo Founders & Indie Hackers

— If you're building a product alone or with a tiny team, Rank Prompt's Starter plan at $39/month (billed annually) gives you AI visibility tracking, content generation, and SEO audits. That's a full-stack AI SEO toolkit for the price of a single traditional SEO subscription.
Content Creators & Bloggers

— You're already creating content. Rank Prompt shows you how to make that content work harder in AI search. The gap analysis alone is worth it—knowing which topics AI ignores you on helps you prioritize what to write next.
SEO Agencies & Consultants
— Unlimited brands on every plan means you can onboard clients without watching your bill balloon. The reporting and competitor tracking features are polished enough to share directly with clients.
E-commerce Operators

— With Shopify integration and citation outreach tools, Rank Prompt helps product brands get recommended when shoppers ask AI for suggestions. "What's the best running shoe under $100?" is now an AI query—and Rank Prompt helps you be the answer.
Marketing Teams at Growing Companies

— If you're past the startup phase but not yet at enterprise scale, the Pro plan ($71.25/month billed annually) gives you 500 credits, a $25/month Agent Mode budget, and everything you need to coordinate AI visibility across multiple campaigns.
Want more examples? This
Rank Prompt use cases guide
covers specific scenarios across industries.
Pricing That Makes Sense
Rank Prompt offers three tiers, all with a 7-day free trial and the option to cancel anytime:
| Plan | Monthly (Annual Billing) | Credits | Agent Mode Budget |
Starter
| $39.17/mo | 150/month | $5/month |
Pro
Scale
| Custom | Custom | Custom |

Credits flex across three uses: AI visibility prompts (1 credit each), AI-generated articles (10 credits each), or Lighthouse audits (5 credits each). So on the Starter plan, you could run 150 visibility prompts, or 15 articles, or 30 audits—or any combination.
Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly. And the free trial genuinely lets you explore the full platform before you pay a dime.

I've looked at a lot of SEO tool pricing over the years. For what Rank Prompt delivers—especially the AI visibility tracking across six platforms—$39/month is remarkably fair. Tools that cover only traditional SEO often cost more.
Ready to see where your brand stands in AI search?
Start your free trial at Rank Prompt
and run your first visibility report today.
Getting Started With Rank Prompt
Setting up Rank Prompt takes about five minutes:
Sign up
at rankprompt.com and start your 7-day free trial.
Add your brand
— enter your website URL and brand name.
Define your topics
— tell Rank Prompt what prompts you want to track. Be specific: "best project management software" is better than just "project management."
Run your first report
— Rank Prompt scans all six AI platforms and returns a visibility score with detailed breakdowns.
Act on the gaps
— use the content generation tool to create optimized articles, and the outreach tools to build citations where you're missing.
Pro tip: start broad with 10-15 prompts across your main topics, then narrow down to the ones where you have the biggest gaps. That's where the ROI lives.
For more strategies and optimization advice, this
Rank Prompt tips & best practices guide
is a goldmine.
Final Thoughts

AI search isn't coming—it's already here. Hundreds of millions of queries happen inside AI tools every single week, and that number is accelerating. The brands that figure out AI visibility now will have a compounding advantage over those that wait.

Rank Prompt makes that figuring-out process straightforward, actionable, and affordable. It tracks where you stand, generates content to close the gaps, and helps you build the citations that AI engines trust. The dashboard is clean, the insights are specific, and the pricing respects your budget.
I'm genuinely impressed by how well Rank Prompt understands the AI search landscape. It doesn't try to do everything—it focuses on the one thing that matters most right now: being recommended by AI.
If you've read this far, you clearly care about your brand's visibility. Don't just think about it—
go test Rank Prompt for free right now
. Seven days, zero risk, and you'll walk away knowing exactly where you stand in the new era of search.

children.text: What AI platforms does Rank Prompt track?

Rank Prompt monitors your brand visibility across six major AI platforms: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Mode, Gemini, Claude, and Grok. You can see where each platform mentions your brand and where you're missing from recommendations.
Is there a free trial for Rank Prompt?

Yes. Every Rank Prompt plan includes a 7-day free trial with bonus credits. You can cancel anytime during or after the trial without being charged. This gives you enough time to run visibility reports and test the content generation tools.
How are credits used in Rank Prompt?

Credits are flexible across three features: AI visibility prompts cost 1 credit each, AI-generated articles cost 10 credits each, and Lighthouse SEO audits cost 5 credits each. On the Starter plan, you get 150 credits per month to allocate however you want.
Can I track multiple brands or clients with Rank Prompt?

Absolutely. All Rank Prompt plans include unlimited brands, making it ideal for agencies, consultants, or anyone managing multiple websites. You don't pay extra per brand—this is included from the Starter tier onward.
